# Samsung Library Notes

## Samsung Capacitors

Samsung capacitor generation is based on CL-series part-number decoding from `filtered_samsung_mlcc.csv`, emitted by `samsung-capacitors.py` into `build/samsung-capacitors.xls`.

This folder contains:

- `samsung-capacitors.py` (generator)
- `filtered_samsung_mlcc.csv` (input MPN list)
- `reference/` (datasheets and naming references)
- `General/`, `Automotive/`, `History/` (supporting source material)
